curation_notes: Patch modifies only src/mem.rs (1 file, +4 -4 lines). The fix adds .min(c_uint::MAX as usize) before casting usize to c_uint in both Compress::compress() and Decompress::decompress(). Locations derived directly from the patch diff. No sibling files contain the same vulnerable pattern. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow (CWE-190) confirmed — the vulnerability is a classic integer truncation from usize (64-bit) to u32 when passing buffer lengths to the bzip2 C FFI.
